project_info.name: E2E Test Dashboard
project_info.current_tech: Next.js 16, Neon Postgres, MCP (Model Context Protocol)
project_info.user_goal: Create a "Seamless Integration" experience for users to connect the dashboard to their AI agents (Claude, Cursor, Local LLMs). Target date: Dec 2025 (Best Practices).

requirement.name: 1. Persistent Secure Authentication
requirement.description: Move away from ephemeral JWTs. Agents need long-lived, revocable credentials.
requirement.tasks: - **Schema**: Create `api_keys` table (id, key_hash, user_id, org_id, label, last_used_at). - **Logic**: Update `lib/mcp/auth.ts` to validate `sk_live_...` keys alongside JWTs. - **UI**: "Developer Settings" section to managing keys.

requirement.name: 2. Standardized SSE Transport
requirement.description: Ensure robust compatibility with the official MCP SDKs used by Claude Desktop and Cursor.
requirement.tasks: - Implement `GET /api/mcp` as a proper SSE Stream (Server-Sent Events). - Implement `POST /api/mcp?sessionId=...` for JSON-RPC message handling. - Ensure strict compliance with JSON-RPC 2.0 over SSE.

requirement.name: 3. "AI-First" Installation Flows
requirement.description: Instead of just manual docs, provide methods for *Agents* to install themselves.

features.feature: Clean UI with Copy-Paste JSON for `claude_desktop_config.json`.

A one-line curl command: `npx @e2e-dashboard/install --key sk_...` (or similar shell script) that auto-edits the valid config files. *For MVP*: Just provide the command string to run a local helper script if we build one, or stick to the "AI Install" below.

**Crucial for "Seamlessness"**: A "Copy Instructions for Agent" button. Content: "You are an AI assistant. I want to connect my local environment to the E2E Dashboard MCP server. Please edit my `claude_desktop_config.json` to include this server configuration: [JSON]..." This allows the user to just tell their existing local agent to do the setup.

requirement.name: 4. The "Connect" Experience
requirement.details: - **Hero Section**: "Connect your AI Workforce". - **Tabs**: "Claude Desktop", "Cursor", "Windsurf", "Custom". - **Dynamic Config**: The JSON snippet updates in real-time as you select/generate an API Key. - **Status Badge**: Real-time "Waiting for connection..." -> "Connected!" indicator (using SSE connection state).

step.title: Backend Foundation
step.instructions: - Create `api_keys` table. - Update `lib/mcp/auth.ts` to support API Keys. - Create `app/api/mcp/sse.ts` (or equivalent) to handle the connection lifecycle.

step.title: The "Connect" Page UI
step.instructions: - Build `app/connect/page.tsx`. - Use Shadcn Tabs and Cards. - Implement "Generate Key" and "Revoke Key" UI. - Create the "Copy Prompt for AI" feature (The "AI Install" flow).

step.title: Verification
step.instructions: - Verify manual connection via Claude Desktop. - Verify "AI Install" by pasting the prompt into a local agent (if available) or simulating it.

v0_prompt.style_guide: - **Aesthetic**: Premium, dark mode, "Glassmorphism" accents. - **Copy**: Empowering, developer-focused. "Give your AI access to real-time test data."
